features: GIVES CONFIDENCE FOR PERFECT RESULTS: Our expertly designed EasyGripTM tab removes shortest of hairs* from the root even on the 1st application. With almond oil known for its soothing properties.
LONG LASTING SMOOTHNESS: Leaves skin exfoliated and keeps smoothness for up to 28 days.
FOR BEST RESULTS: use Perfect Finish wipe with argan oil for great skin finish, or try Veet Expert Miraculous oil for moisturised skin
DERMATOLGICALLY TESTED: Each pack contains 20 double sided strips equal to 40 uses and 4 finishing wipes
IDEAL FOR: Sensitive Skin, small and delicate areas like upper lips, cheeks and chins

Before every use test your skin reaction, by applying and removing the product to a small part of the area you wish to treat, following the directions for use. If after 24 hours there is no adverse reaction, continue to use
description: Product Description Veet Expert Hair Removal Wax Strips for Women, long lasting smoothness for face, suitable for sensitive skin, 20 strips with natural argan oil finishing wipes Ingredients WAX STRIPS Ingredients: Hydrogenated Styrene/Methyl Styrene/Indene Copolymer, Paraffinum Liquidum, Silica, Polyethylene, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-di-t-butylhydroxyhydrocinnamate, Parfum, Tocopheryl Acetate, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Linalool, Hexyl Cinnamal, Benzyl Salicylate, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, CI 77891, CI 77007 WIPES Ingredients: Paraffinum Liquidum, Hexyldecyl Stearate, Camelina Sativa Seed Oil, Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil, Parfum, Benzyl Salicylate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool Directions 1. Apply wax to the face, avoiding eyes, eyebrows and lips. 2. Apply the wax strips to the face and leave them on the skin for 10-15 minutes. 3. Remove the wax strips in the direction of hair growth. 4. Wash your face with warm water and wash your hands. 5. Take a skin test before use and keep out of reach of children. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Test skin reaction before use. Use hypoallergenic product to reduce risk of allergic reactions. Manufacturer Contact Information RB Healthcare UK (Ltd), Dansom Lane, Hull, HU8 7DS, UK. UK: PO Box 4044, Slough, SL1 0NS. ROI: Citywest Business Campus, Dublin 24. See more
